news.headline: Seven Hills Realty Trust to release Q2 2024 financial results on July 29, with conference call on July 30 at 11:00 am ET. Nasdaq: SEVN.
news.summary: Seven Hills Realty Trust (ticker symbol: SEVN) based in Newton, Massachusetts, is set to release its financial results for the second quarter of 2024 after Nasdaq trading hours on Monday, July 29, 2024. The President, Chief Investment Officer, and CFO of the company, along with Vice President Jared Lewis, will host a conference call at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time on Tuesday, July 30, 2024, to discuss these results. The call will be available to interested parties via phone.

news.headline: NRx Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ:NRXP) releases shareholder update letter detailing revenue and profitability goals for 2025.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, NRx Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: NRXP), a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company based in Radnor, Pennsylvania, shared details about potential routes to revenue and profitability by 2025. On July 1, 2024, the company released a new Shareholder Update outlining its strategies for growth. NRx Pharmaceuticals aims to leverage these plans to enhance financial performance and drive profitability in the coming year.

news.headline: Seven Hills Realty Trust closes $23.8M loan to recapitalize Los Angeles self-storage property (80k sq ft). SEVN on Nasdaq.
news.summary: Seven Hills Realty Trust (Nasdaq: SEVN) based in Newton, Massachusetts, has successfully closed a $23.8 million first mortgage floating rate loan deal. This loan is intended to recapitalize 2515 S Broadway in Los Angeles, California. The property encompasses an 80,000 square foot newly constructed self-storage facility branded as Extra Space Storage. The loan offers a three-year initial term with the possibility of two one-year extensions based on specific borrower requirements. Tremont Realty Capital, SEVN’s manager, facilitated the transaction smoothly.

news.headline: Corporate restructuring mandates to increase over the next two years due to geopolitical factors, higher interest rates, and regulations. Worlwide study by CSC predicts rising demand for restructuring services.
news.summary: In Wilmington, Delaware, a recent study commissioned by CSC, the top provider of global business administration and compliance solutions, predicts a significant increase in new corporate restructuring mandates in the next two years. This uptick is attributed to distressed companies facing challenges from geopolitical uncertainty, rising interest rates, and evolving regulatory landscapes. The study, titled "Global Restructuring Trends in 2024: Navigating the Opportunities and Challenges," indicates a rising trend in corporate restructuring activities. With these factors at play, the study forecasts a continued growth in restructuring mandates.

news.headline: Masimo introduces Sleep Halo™ for Masimo W1®, offering advanced sleep analysis for wearables.
news.summary: A new feature is being added to the Masimo W1® Sport advanced health tracking wearable in Irvine, California. The feature, Sleep Halo™, will provide scientifically based sleep analysis.

news.headline: Chipotle introduces limited-time menu of top athletes' go-to orders; names include Anthony Edwards, Sophia Smith, Taylor Fritz, Sara Hughes, and Jagger Eaton. New "Unwrapped" series launched.
news.summary: Chipotle announced that limited-edition menu items featuring the favorite orders of Anthony Edwards, Sophia Smith, Taylor Fritz, Sara Hughes, and Jagger Eaton will be available on the Chipotle app and Chipotle.com. Additionally, the company has released new episodes of its "Unwrapped" series showcasing behind-the-scenes content. This move aims to attract customers and promote the brand.

news.headline: dunnhumby launches AI-powered Assortment Solution for localized assortments based on customer preferences.
news.summary: A company based in Cincinnati known as dunnhumby has unveiled its latest assortment solution powered by advanced AI technology. This new solution, dunnhumby Assortment, aims to transform the way retailers choose products. Its key features include the ability for retailers to offer highly localized assortments, customized to suit the specific preferences of their customer demographics. This innovation allows for a more personalized shopping experience. Additionally, the solution introduces space-conscious assortments and planograms to optimize store layout and product placement. By leveraging cutting-edge AI, dunnhumby is paving the way for a new era in retail product selection.

news.headline: Boston Scientific (NYSE: BSX) will discuss Q2 2024 results on July 24, 2024, at 8:00 a.m. ET via webcast.
news.summary: In Marlborough, Massachusetts, Boston Scientific Corporation (NYSE: BSX) is scheduled to broadcast a webcast of its conference call to review financial results and business achievements for the second quarter concluding on June 30, 2024. The webcast is slated for Wednesday, July 24, 2024, at 8:00 a.m. ET. This call will provide insights into the company's performance for the specified period.

news.headline: ADP to report Q4 fiscal 2024 results on July 31. Important for investors. Watch for Nasdaq opening figures. #HCM #ADP #finance
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Roseland, New Jersey, ADP (Nasdaq: ADP), a prominent global Human Capital Management (HCM) solutions provider, is set to announce its financial outcomes for the fourth fiscal quarter concluding on June 30, 2024. The results will be disclosed prior to the Nasdaq market opening on Wednesday, July 31...

news.headline: Salesloft ranked as leader in 2024 IDC MarketScape Report for Worldwide Revenue Intelligence Platforms and mentioned in Gartner Hype Cycle™ for Revenue and Sales Technology 2024.
news.summary: Atlanta-based Salesloft has been acknowledged as a Sample Vendor in the GartnerⓇ Hype Cycle™ for Revenue and Sales Technology in 2024. The company offers the sole Revenue Orchestration Platform that focuses on prioritizing, automating, and suggesting actions for revenue teams. This recognition highlights Salesloft's innovative approach in the industry.

news.headline: Intelligent Audit receives 2024 Top Supply Chain Projects Award for innovative projects enhancing supply chain efficiency.
news.summary: Rochelle Park, N.J., July 1, 2024 - A prestigious award is highlighting groundbreaking case studies that aim to enhance and automate supply chain processes. Supply & Demand Chain Executive, a leading publication in the global supply chain industry, is recognizing innovative projects that focus on streamlining and optimizing supply chain operations. This award showcases successful initiatives that have significantly improved efficiency in supply chain management.

news.headline: Avantor® announces new J.T.Baker® Cell Lysis Solution and Endonuclease optimizing gene therapy manufacturing at scale.
news.summary: Avantor, Inc. (NYSE: AVTR), a prominent global supplier of essential products and services to the life sciences and advanced industries, has introduced cutting-edge solutions to enhance the harvest process in gene therapy manufacturing. Their innovative approaches optimize production sustainably and at scale. This development, announced in Radnor, Pennsylvania on July 1, 2024, marks a significant step forward in revolutionizing gene therapy manufacturing.

news.headline: Kraig Labs (OTCQB: KBLB) expands to increase spider silk production as full capacity reached, opening new facilities.
news.summary: Kraig Laboratories, trading under OTCQB as KBLB, has successfully reached full production capacity at its current site. In response to this milestone, the company has announced plans to establish new production facilities to further expand its operations.

news.headline: Senti Bio receives $8 million grant from CIRM for clinical development of SENTI-202.
news.summary: A grant totaling $8 million has been provided by the California Institute for Regenerative Medicines (CIRM) to Senti Bio for the purpose of aiding in the clinical development of SENTI-202.

news.headline: Covalent Logic launches psychologist board on Cicero Licensing platform in Louisiana.
news.summary: A Louisiana-based company, Covalent Logic, has announced the successful launch of a new state licensing board on its Cicero Licensing platform. The platform, known for its efficiency in managing licensing processes, continues to expand its reach. This latest development marks another milestone for Covalent Logic as it further solidifies its position in the corporate communications sector. The specific licensing board in Louisiana adds to the growing number of entities benefitting from the platform's capabilities, demonstrating its increasing significance.

news.headline: Babson Diagnostics partners with ELLKAY to simplify clinician orders for BetterWay blood testing, improving patient experience.
news.summary: Austin-based company Babson Diagnostics has revealed their collaboration with ELLKAY to streamline the ordering process for their BetterWay™ blood tests. The partnership aims to assist clinicians in providing improved patient care and enhancing adherence to necessary testing. ELLKAY, a key laboratory partner since 2002, will offer their lab-ordering solution to facilitate this initiative. The move signifies a crucial step forward for Babson Diagnostics in their mission to support healthcare professionals and elevate the patient experience.

news.headline: Deluxe CEO Barry C. McCarthy to be inducted into Georgia Fintech Hall of Fame for transforming organization. $3 trillion processed annually.
news.summary: Deluxe, a Payments and Data company, revealed that their President and CEO, Barry C. McCarthy, will be honored as the 2024 inductee to the Technology Association of Georgia (TAG) Fintech Hall of Fame. McCarthy, who took on this role in late 2018, has successfully led Deluxe's evolution from a traditional check printer to a forefront provider of digital payment and data services. Under his leadership, Deluxe now handles close to $3 trillion in payment volume each year.

news.headline: GCT Semiconductor Holding Inc. joins Russell 3000® Index, leading in 5G/4G semiconductor solutions, effective July 1, 2024.
news.summary: Based in San Jose, California, GCT Semiconductor Holding Inc., a prominent provider of cutting-edge 5G and 4G semiconductor solutions, disclosed its inclusion in the Russell 3000® Index under the ticker symbol GCTS on the NYSE. This development took effect on July 1, 2024, coinciding with the commencement of the US equity market trading. The Russell reconstitution, an annual event, involves selecting the top 4,000 US stocks as of April 30th, based on their total market capitalization.

news.headline: Pitney Bowes Inc. increases cost savings target to $70 million, with majority already achieved in second quarter.
news.summary: In Stamford, Connecticut, Pitney Bowes Inc. (NYSE: PBI) disclosed progress on its cost rationalization plan, initially announced in late May 2024. The global company, offering shipping, mailing, technology, logistics, and financial services, revealed that around $70 million in cost savings were identified and implemented. The bulk of these savings were realized during the second quarter, with a significant portion of costs already eliminated.

news.headline: Novo Holdings invests in MATR Foods for expanding plant-based fungi food production in Denmark.
news.summary: In Denmark, Novo Holdings revealed on July 1, 2024 an initial funding for the Danish food-tech start-up MATR Foods ('MATR') to aid in expanding its production of sustainable meat substitutes. Founded in Copenhagen in 2021, MATR focuses on creating...

news.headline: Guidewheel introduces Scout, an AI-driven maintenance tool to predict issues before downtime. Helps manufacturers detect anomalies and prevent failures.
news.summary: Guidewheel, a prominent AI-powered FactoryOps platform, unveiled Scout, a new product designed to assist manufacturers in anticipating maintenance requirements and identifying warning signs of potential problems before they result in machine downtime or breakdowns. Scout, which utilizes AI technology, monitors machine performance data continuously to pinpoint anomalies and notify the team about potential issues. By detecting subtle changes in machine performance early on, Scout aims to prevent larger problems and keep operations running smoothly.

news.headline: Hornetsecurity awarded 2024 EMEA Company of the Year by Frost & Sullivan for pioneering cloud-based email security.
news.summary: Hornetsecurity offers a wide range of cloud-based services that safeguard email communications, data, and support business continuity, leading to enhanced innovation and customer contentment. On July 1, 2024, in SAN ANTONIO, a report by Frost & Sullivan was released, which delved into the email security sector, revealing key insights and trends.

news.headline: Paralyzed Veterans of America reelects U.S. Army Veteran Robert Thomas as national president for second year.
news.summary: Robert Thomas, a former U.S. Army veteran, has been re-elected as the national president for Paralyzed Veterans of America for the second consecutive year. This organization is known as the leading nonprofit supporting disabled veterans, their families, and caregivers in the United States. The announcement was made on July 1, 2024, in Washington.

news.headline: AM Best affirms A- rating for At-Bay Carrier, with a "Stable" outlook, based on strong balance sheet.
news.summary: In San Francisco, At-Bay, a digital age insurance provider, recently received affirmation from AM Best for its Financial Strength Rating of A- (Excellent) with a "Stable" outlook. This rating underscores AM Best's confidence in At-Bay's robust balance sheet and strategic efforts, foreseeing a steady operating performance post its 2023 annual review. At-Bay Specialty Insurance Company, focusing on excess and surplus coverage, is set to maintain its strong financial standing and operational efficiency.

news.headline: Shreds.AI rebuilds WordPress code from PHP to Java in less than 24 hours, modernizing architecture.
news.summary: In both San Francisco and Paris, Shreds.AI has successfully converted PHP code to Java and updated the WordPress architecture with cutting-edge technology. This transformation encompassed enhancing the entire WordPress framework with modern standards.

news.headline: Thompson Thrift developing 212-unit luxury multifamily community "The Levi" near Atlanta suburb.
news.summary: Atlanta-based Thompson Thrift, a well-known real estate firm and a top multifamily development company in the US, revealed plans on July 1, 2024 for The Levi project. This venture involves the construction of a high-quality multifamily residence named The Levi, boasting a total of 212 units. The property is set to be situated in an Atlanta suburb...

news.headline: The Aesthetic Society reports 10.2% growth in aesthetic plastic surgery, with exclusive data on comprehensive breast implant procedures.
news.summary: Recently, new data from Aesthetic Society showcased in the ARISE study sheds light on the various breast implant procedures performed across the nation. The report, released by the leading authority on aesthetic plastic surgery, reveals insights into comprehensive procedures. This data, part of the annual Aesthetic Plastic Surgery National Databank report, comes from research conducted in Garden Grove, California. The findings highlight the latest trends and statistics in the field, offering crucial information for professionals and patients alike.

news.headline: Siren Marine ships Siren 3 Pro with all Yamaha Helm Master EX kits, expanding Connected Boat technology to more customers.
news.summary: In Kennesaw, Georgia, Siren Marine, a global leader in Connected Boat® technology, revealed that its top product, the Siren 3 Pro, will now be included as a standard feature in all multi-engine Yamaha Helm Master EX full maneuverability kits. This strategic integration aims to introduce the Connected Boat technology to a broader customer base, especially targeting premium boat buyers. By partnering with Yamaha, Siren Marine is expanding its reach and enhancing the experience for Yamaha boat builders.

news.headline: Rio Grande LNG issues $1.115B in senior secured notes at 6.58% interest rate, to reduce borrowings for Phase 1.
news.summary: In Houston, NextDecade Corporation revealed that its subsidiary, Rio Grande LNG, LLC, has successfully issued $1.115 billion in senior secured notes through a private placement. These notes carry an interest rate of 6.58% and will serve to decrease existing borrowings and commitments under Rio Grande LNG's current term loan facilities for Phase 1 at the Rio Grande LNG Facility.

news.headline: VOLO Events Agency named to top 100 by Event Marketer for 2024. Recognized for excellence in experiential marketing.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Atlanta, VOLO Events Agency (VOLO), a leading producer of experiential marketing and live events, was revealed as a part of Event Marketer's notable 2024 IT List. This exclusive list showcases the Top 100 Event Agencies excelling in the field of experiential marketing.

news.headline: Newly built apartments filling at slowest pace since 2020: Only 47% rented in 3 months, down from 60%.
news.summary: In Seattle, a recent report by Redfin revealed that only 47% of newly constructed apartments finished in Q4 were leased within three months. This marks a decrease from 60% in the previous year and stands as the lowest seasonally-adjusted percentage recorded, except for Q1 of 2020 due to the pandemic. The latest occupancy rate signifies a growing trend of delayed rentals for new properties. The report by the technology-based brokerage demonstrated a notable shift in the housing market dynamics.

news.headline: New Fortress Energy to sell Miami facility to US fund, expected to close in Q3 2024. One train can produce 8,300.
news.summary: New York-based New Fortress Energy Inc. (Nasdaq: NFE) has confirmed the sale of its Miami Facility, including a liquefaction and storage site in Florida, to a U.S. middle-market infrastructure fund. The agreement, subject to standard conditions, is projected to be finalized in the third quarter of 2024. The Miami Facility, which houses a single liquefaction train, can generate 8,300 units.

news.headline: Booz Allen wins $419M NSF contract for Information Technology Mission Application Support to modernize agency's operations.
news.summary: Booz Allen Hamilton (NYSE: BAH) from McLean, Virginia has secured a significant contract with the National Science Foundation (NSF) worth $419 million over seven years. This contract, known as Information Technology Mission Application Support (ITMAS), will involve Booz Allen in the modernization and IT operations of the NSF's merit review and grants management system. This system plays a crucial role in supporting investments for scientific research. Booz Allen's expertise in managing complex IT projects played a key role in winning this recompete contract.

news.headline: NiSource releases its 2024 ESG Report, focusing on community impact and sustainability initiatives. #ESG #NiSource
news.summary: NiSource Inc, a prominent fully-regulated utility company listed on NYSE under the symbol NI, headquartered in Merrillville, Indiana, has recently rolled out its 2024 ESG Report titled “Creating Shared Value”. This report showcases advancements in crucial projects aimed at benefitting the communities NiSource operates in, ensuring customer satisfaction, and fostering sustainable growth. Key highlights include the integration of low-carbon fuels and renewable energy sources into their energy mix to diversify their offerings.

news.headline: o9 adds generative AI-powered agents to its Digital Brain platform for complex planning tasks, boosting integrated business planning capabilities.
news.summary: A company based in Dallas, o9, specializing in enterprise AI software, has upgraded its Digital Brain platform by integrating generative AI-driven Large Language Model (LLM) composite agents. These advanced agents aim to transform the approach to executing intricate tasks, ultimately enhancing integrated business planning abilities. By utilizing cutting-edge technology, o9's composite agents are expected to redefine planning processes, leading to improved performance. This upgrade signifies a significant advancement in leveraging AI for streamlining business planning strategies.

news.headline: Tellurian sells assets for $260 million, pays off $230 million in debt, strengthening balance sheet for LNG project.
news.summary: Houston-based Tellurian Inc. disclosed today the completion of the sale of its integrated upstream assets for $260 million to Aethon Energy Management LLC, meeting a stated goal outlined in May. The deal significantly bolsters the company's financial position as it progresses with the Driftwood LNG project. The proceeds of $260 million were used to pay off $230 million of non-current debt. Tellurian's stock trades on the NYSE American under the symbol TELL.

news.headline: Nicholas Cumins becomes CEO of Bentley Systems, emphasizing AI-powered infrastructure resilience and operational lifecycle.
news.summary: Nicholas Cumins, the recently appointed CEO of Bentley Systems, has announced plans to enhance infrastructure resilience through the use of artificial intelligence. He will concentrate on improving operations during the lifecycle phase of projects.

news.headline: Qualcomm Technologies partners with Manchester United, featuring Snapdragon brand on 2024/25 kits.
news.summary: In Manchester, England, Qualcomm Technologies, Inc. has been revealed as the new principal shirt partner for Manchester United's men's and women's teams. This partnership was announced alongside the debut of the new home kit for the 2024/25 season, which prominently features the Snapdragon® brand. This collaboration marks an expansion of the current strategic partnership with Qualcomm Technologies, with the Snapdragon brand set to be showcased on the away and third kits as well. Notably, Snapdragon processors are widely utilized, with a significant presence in various devices.

news.headline: Shoes For Crews completes sale to lenders, emerges from Chapter 11, strengthens financial position.
news.summary: Shoes For Crews, LLC, a renowned global leader in slip-resistant footwear based in Boca Raton, Florida, has successfully finalized the sale of most of its assets to its primary secured lenders through a stalking horse credit bid. This significant transaction, known as the Sale Transaction, signifies the Company's exit from Chapter 11 proceedings. Following this sale, the Company has effectively reorganized its operations.

news.headline: Vitacost.com awarded 5-star Customer Service Champion by USA Today, reflects commitment to excellence.
news.summary: Vitacost.com, a prominent online health and wellness product retailer based in Boca Raton, Florida, has proudly received a five-star rating as a Customer Service Champion on USA Today's America's Customer Service Champions 2024 list. This recognition, in partnership with Plant-A Insights Group, highlights Vitacost's dedication to delivering outstanding customer service. The list, which celebrates businesses known for exceptional customer experiences, showcases Vitacost's commitment to excellence.

news.headline: Albert G. White III appointed to Evolus' board, effective July 1. #Evolus #NASDAQ #EOLS
news.summary: In Newport Beach, California, Evolus, Inc. (NASDAQ: EOLS), a beauty company emphasizing consumer brands, appointed Albert G. White III from The Cooper Companies, Inc. as a director on the board starting July 1. Mr. White will be part of Evolus’ Compensation Committee. "We are delighted to have Al White join the Evolus Board," said Vik Malik, Chairman.

news.headline: Perfect Corp partners with NAO-ART for virtual wig try-on in Japan with 53 wig options, aiming to enhance customer experience.
news.summary: In New York, Perfect Corp., a prominent AI and AR beauty and fashion tech company known for its 'Beautiful AI' solutions, has revealed a partnership with NAO-ART, a subsidiary of Art Nature Group specializing in ready-to-wear wig brands for women. The collaboration will involve Perfect Corp. offering NAO-ART a virtual try-on tool powered by generative AI technology for 53 different wigs, comprising both fashion and medical wigs such as "RIS." Customers will have the opportunity to virtually try on these wigs.

news.headline: Orange County Business Journal names Toshiba as one of the Best Places to Work in 2024 in Lake Forest, Calif.
news.summary: Toshiba has been recognized as one of the Best Places to Work in Orange County by the Orange County Business Journal for the year 2024. This honor signifies Toshiba's commitment to providing a positive work environment for its employees. The prestigious award showcases the company's dedication to creating a workplace that fosters employee satisfaction and well-being.

news.headline: BigCommerce achieves top ranking in IDC MarketScape for headless commerce apps for enterprise & midmarket with developer-friendly MACH architecture.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, BigCommerce's API-first, headless architecture has been praised for its developer and business-user friendly approach, offering flexibility and high performance. The platform's recognition stems from its strength in MACH principles, emphasizing a modern, adaptive, composable, and headless framework for optimal functionality and user experience. The company's focus on these attributes has led to its standing as a market leader, attaining significant praise for its innovative and versatile approach in the industry.

news.headline: Stacy Cozad appointed as Allegion's new General Counsel, effective Aug. 5, 2024, succeeding Jeff Braun who retires Dec. 31, 2024.
news.summary: Dublin-based Allegion plc (NYSE: ALLE), a prominent global provider of security products and solutions, has named Stacy Cozad as senior vice president, general counsel, and corporate secretary, starting from Aug. 5, 2024. In her new position, Cozad will oversee Allegion’s worldwide legal matters, trade compliance, enterprise risk management, and corporate communications. She is taking over from Jeff Braun, who is set to retire on Dec. 31, 2024, and will also hold the role of ad.

news.headline: Guess?, Inc. expands European credit facility by EUR 100 million, raising total borrowing capacity to EUR 350 million.
news.summary: Guess?, Inc. (NYSE: GES) has increased its borrowing capacity under its European revolving credit facility from €250 million to €350 million. The facility, managed by Guess Europe Sagl, a wholly-owned Swiss subsidiary, has approximately three years remaining. The interest rate for the facility is subject to an annual adjustment in alignment with the company's sustainability goals.

news.headline: Deutsche Telekom partners with LotusFlare for MACE platform; LotusFlare DNO Cloud to power MACE SEP for API monetization.
news.summary: LotusFlare, Inc. is set to utilize its DNO Cloud to support the MACE Service Enablement Platform (SEP) in monetizing APIs. The company, based in Santa Clara, California, revealed on July 1, 2024, that it has partnered with Deutsche Telekom for this initiative. The agreement solidifies LotusFlare's role in providing the foundational platform for this project, highlighting its technological prowess in this area.

news.headline: Noodles & Company celebrates National Mac & Cheese Day all month with Macapalooza, offering new menu items and $1 side Mac for Rewards members.
news.summary: This July, Noodles & Company is introducing their exclusive Macapalooza menu featuring a new limited-time Mac & Cheese Mashup selection. Additionally, customers can enjoy a $1 Side Mac special, among other rewards for members only. This initiative is part of the chain's commitment to offering Uncommon Goodness. Based in Broomfield, Colo., Noodles & Company presents this special offer as of July 1, 2024.

news.headline: Stellantis will reveal H1 2024 results on July 25.
EcoFlow announces exclusive deals on best-selling portable power stations for Amazon's Prime Day from July 1-23.
news.summary: Starting from July 1st till July 23rd, customers can enjoy exclusive discounts on popular products, along with the launch of the latest DELTA Pro 3 by EcoFlow. A renowned provider of portable power and sustainable energy solutions, EcoFlow is introducing incredible deals on their top-selling portable power stations as part of the promotion on Amazon.
